title: QFINHUB Off-Topic Noindex Proposal — Formal Review for Auditor + Technical Guardian
status: PROPOSAL — AWAITING AUDITOR + TECHNICAL GUARDIAN APPROVAL
policy: Do NOT execute noindex until explicitly approved by Auditor AND Technical Guardian.

pages_proposed.topic: Reality TV (90 Day Fiance) — pop culture with forced mortgage angle
pages_proposed.off_brand_assessment: A financial calculator platform ranking for reality TV gossip. This dilutes Google's understanding of QFINHUB as a finance authority.
pages_proposed.can_reframe_financially: NO — The core topic is entertainment, not finance. The mortgage connection is tangential.
pages_proposed.seo_risk_of_keeping: HIGH — Each impression for unrelated queries teaches Google that QFINHUB is an entertainment site. This directly harms ranking potential for finance calculator queries.
pages_proposed.seo_risk_of_noindexing: LOW — 6 impressions is negligible traffic. No backlinks to this page. No linked pages depend on it for internal link equity.
pages_proposed.adsense_risk: MEDIUM — AdSense reviewers may flag this as low-quality/off-topic content and reject the application.
pages_proposed.recommendation: NOINDEX — Remove from Google index. Keep page accessible on site but add <meta name='robots' content='noindex'>.
pages_proposed.trigger: Currently 6 imp, pos 8.5. Already meets threshold for noindex consideration.

pages_proposed.off_brand_assessment: Hungary-specific financial news with forced mortgage connection. QFINHUB targets US audience. This page ranks for Hungary-specific queries that won't convert.
pages_proposed.can_reframe_financially: PARTIALLY — Could be rewritten as a general 'How Central Bank Rates Affect Your Mortgage' guide, but the existing content is timeliness-dependent (June cut).
pages_proposed.seo_risk_of_keeping: MEDIUM — 23 impressions is significant (10.8% of all API traffic). These impressions train Google on Hungary geo relevance, diluting US-focus.
pages_proposed.seo_risk_of_noindexing: MEDIUM — 23 impressions is meaningful for a new site. Losing this traffic during domain sandbox could slow overall discovery. But these impressions aren't converting to clicks.
pages_proposed.recommendation: HOLD — Do NOT noindex yet. Monitor. If >50 imp or position reaches top 5, escalate to noindex review. Consider rewriting as evergreen 'central bank rate + mortgage' content.

pages_proposed.off_brand_assessment: UK-specific content on US-focused site. Low impressions but position 5 is notable.
pages_proposed.recommendation: HOLD — Monitor. Low risk due to low impression volume.

pages_proposed.off_brand_assessment: Not educational finance — this is market commentary/tip. Doesn't align with calculator platform.
pages_proposed.recommendation: HOLD — Low risk. Monitor quarterly. If group of stock-picking pages grows, batch-noindex.

pages_proposed.off_brand_assessment: Geopolitical/market commentary, not calculator or educational finance.
pages_proposed.recommendation: HOLD — Low risk. Same as above.

summary.primary_risk: 90 Day Fiance — entertainment ranking on finance site, highest brand/SEO toxicity
